examples: Celeriac is the white round part of the celery root.
Peel a celeriac and rub the surface with a cut lemon.
Arrange it on top of the celeriac cake. Cover with sherry sauce.
Slivers of rich duck breast and liver were balanced by celeriac and dandelion greens.
Celeriac is a celery variety refined over time to produce an increasingly large, solid, globular root just below the soil surface.
